'''dadhoyo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:noctiphobia|noctiphobia]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| d-dh-y
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:noctiphobia|noctiphobia]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| dadhoyo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:dædheyeth|dædheyeth]] || [[word:dædheyej|dædheyej]] || [[word:dædheyesh|dædheyesh]] || [[word:dædheye|dædheye]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:dadhodhoyoth|dadhodhoyoth]] || [[word:dadhodhoyoj|dadhodhoyoj]] || [[word:dadhodhoyosh|dadhodhoyosh]] || [[word:dadhodhoyo|dadhodhoyo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:dadhoyoth|dadhoyoth]] || [[word:dadhoyoj|dadhoyoj]] || [[word:dadhoyosh|dadhoyosh]] || [[word:dadhoyo|dadhoyo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:dadhofyoth|dadhofyoth]] || [[word:dadhofyoj|dadhofyoj]] || [[word:dadhofyosh|dadhofyosh]] || [[word:dadhofyof|dadhofyof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:dadhoyotho|dadhoyotho]] || [[word:dadhoyojo|dadhoyojo]] || [[word:dadhoyosho|dadhoyosho]] || [[word:dadhoyoko|dadhoyoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:dadhoyoth|dadhoyoth]] || [[word:dadhoyoj|dadhoyoj]] || [[word:dadhoyosh|dadhoyosh]] || [[word:dadhoyo|dadhoyo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:dadhoyothol|dadhoyothol]] || [[word:dadhoyojol|dadhoyojol]] || [[word:dadhoyoshol|dadhoyoshol]] || [[word:dadhoyokol|dadhoyokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:dadhoyothotho|dadhoyothotho]] || [[word:dadhoyojojo|dadhoyojojo]] || [[word:dadhoyoshosho|dadhoyoshosho]] || [[word:dadhoyoko|dadhoyoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:dadhoyothon|dadhoyothon]] || [[word:dadhoyojon|dadhoyojon]] || [[word:dadhoyoshon|dadhoyoshon]] || [[word:dadhoyokon|dadhoyokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:dadhoyothoro|dadhoyothoro]] || [[word:dadhoyojoro|dadhoyojoro]] || [[word:dadhoyoshoro|dadhoyoshoro]] || [[word:dadhoyokoro|dadhoyokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d03cc2d}}
